allow: PowerShell(Write-Host "=== Test simple pull ===" -ForegroundColor Cyan; docker pull hello-world 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5; Write-Host "`n=== DNS test from inside docker WSL VM ===" -ForegroundColor Cyan; wsl -d docker-desktop -- nslookup registry-1.docker.io 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 10; Write-Host "`n=== Current resolv.conf inside docker-desktop ===" -ForegroundColor Cyan; wsl -d docker-desktop -- cat /etc/resolv.conf 2>&1)
Bash(python -m py_compile backend/sms_project/celery.py backend/sms_project/__init__.py backend/sms_project/settings.py backend/apps/payments/tasks.py)

Bash(python -m py_compile backend/apps/academics/models.py backend/apps/academics/serializers.py backend/apps/academics/views.py backend/apps/academics/urls.py backend/apps/academics/reportcards.py backend/apps/academics/admin.py backend/apps/accounts/models.py backend/apps/accounts/permissions.py)
Bash(python -m py_compile backend/apps/admissions/*.py backend/apps/hr/*.py backend/sms_project/urls.py backend/sms_project/settings.py)
Bash(python -c "import yaml,sys; [yaml.safe_load\(open\(f\)\) and print\(f'{f} OK'\) for f in ['.github/workflows/ci.yml','.github/workflows/deploy.yml','.github/workflows/codeql.yml']]")
Bash(python -c "import configparser; c=configparser.ConfigParser\(\); c.read\('ml-service/pytest.ini'\); print\('pytest.ini OK:', dict\(c['pytest']\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import json; [print\(f, 'OK'\) for f in ['backend/railway.json','frontend/railway.json','ml-service/railway.json'] if json.load\(open\(f\)\)]")
